pages.raw_text:
The new scale of the building labor
ers. which contractors have refused
to recognize, resulting in the present
strike, was presented to the building
trades council last night for approval
and was turned down.


The sentiment of the building
trades council has been against the
scale from the first and this is given
as the reason union masons and
bricklayers have been willing to work
with non-union helpers since the
strike.


The fact that carpenters and other
skilled laborers would be receiving
less than the hodcarriers. should this
scale be recognized, is said to be the
secret of the dissatisfaction of the
building trades council with the scale
and the consequent strike.
The hodcarriers are financially the
strongest union in the city and claim
they can win out without any assist
ance from their allied trades. The
strike progresses without any new in
cideuts today.
